column1: # Claim 1 validation — HUMAN (hg38), 2026-07-14. All five models hg38-native (definitive multi-model round).
# Two direct-reprogramming systems: iN (fibroblast->induced neuron, GSE299923 ATAC hg19->hg38 lift + GSE299920 Ascl1 ChIP)
#   and iCM (fibroblast->induced cardiomyocyte, GSE179011 ATAC hg38) -- iCM DROPPED (weak partial transition; see claim1_human_progress.md).
# Ground truth: master-TF LOCI (promoter TSS+/-2kb + gene+/-50kb neighborhood of 26 target-cell master TFs; refGene hg38)
#   and BINDING (iN: in-study Ascl1 ChIP top-decile; iCM: ChIP-Atlas GATA4/TBX5/NKX2-5 iPSC-CM consensus).
# Matched-background AUROC (report AUROC/CI/fold, not perm-p). "opening"/"closing" = signed-daccessibility restricted + magnitude-matched.
